scripts.bootstrap: npm run bootstrap:frontend && npm run bootstrap:backend
scripts.bootstrap:backend: python3 -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e "./api[test]"
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
